rows.evidence_summary: (i) Solve the equation 2|x − 1| = 3|x|. (ii) Hence solve the equation 2|5^x − 1| = 3|5^x|, giving your answer correct to 3 significant figures.
Find the exact value of ∫₀^(1/2) x e^(-2x) dx.
By expressing the equation cosec θ = 3 sin θ + cot θ in terms of cos θ only, solve the equation for 0° < θ < 180°.

The curve with equation y = sin x cos 2x has one stationary point in the interval 0 < x < ½π. Find the x-coordinate of this point, giving your answer correct to 3 significant figures.
